plan.title: packs:slice v2 -- deeper slices across all four packs

narratives.Description: Extend each existing pack's slice registry with the deeper slices deferred from the 0.1 pilot: lessons gains `anti-patterns`, `must`, and `by-authority`; skills, rules, and strategies gain additional named slices beyond their pilot set. All new slices are additive registry entries plus any new named-filter helpers in the shared slice engine, never JSONPath. This story is independently buildable because it only touches the slice resolver and the per-pack schema `x-sliceRegistry` blocks, leaving pack JSON bodies and render registries untouched.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Add new slice definitions to the `x-sliceRegistry` blocks in the four `vbrief/schemas/*-pack.schema.json` schema files (lessons `anti-patterns`/`must`/`by-authority`, plus skills/rules/strategies additions), declaring `path` and `filters[]` per slice.
2. Implement any new named-filter helpers (e.g. an `authority` filter) in the `scripts/packs_slice.py` slice engine alongside the existing `apply_since`/`apply_tags`/`apply_scalar` dispatch, keeping the constrained dotted-path contract.
3. Add coverage to `tests/cli/test_packs_slice.py` that asserts each new slice resolves, filters correctly, and surfaces in `--list`, and verify drift via `task verify:pack-drift`.
narratives.UserStory: As an agent loading framework context, I want deeper named slices for each pack, so that I can pull a precise subset (e.g. only anti-patterns) without reading the whole pack into my context window.

items.title: lessons anti-patterns + by-issue slices resolve; rules must/prohibitions added

narrative.Acceptance: Running `task packs:slice lessons anti-patterns` returns only lesson entries carrying anti-pattern guidance in their body, and `task packs:slice rules prohibitions` returns only MUST_NOT/SHOULD_NOT-tier rules.

Running `task packs:slice lessons by-issue --issue 810` returns only lessons whose issue_refs include the requested issue number (the lessons pack has no authority field, so the issue-ref filter replaces the illustrative by-authority slice).
Each of the skills, rules, and strategies packs returns at least one new named slice beyond its 0.1 pilot set when invoked.

items.title: new slices are discoverable and drift-clean

narrative.Acceptance: Each new slice name appears in `task packs:slice <pack> --list` output and `task verify:pack-drift` validates with no drift.

expected_outputs: New x-sliceRegistry entries in all four pack schemas
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Framework-internal packs:slice v2 work traced to GitHub issue #1637 and design RFC #1283; no specification.vbrief.json spec-section applies to maintainer tooling.

references.title: Issue #1637: feat(packs): packs:slice v2 -- remaining lessons slices + skills/rules/strategies pack surfaces
